name: Jakpaisan Estate Public Company Limited
summary: Jakpaisan Estate Public Company Limited engages in the real estate development business in Thailand. It develops and sells twin houses, single houses, commercial buildings, townhouses, and condominiums. The company also engages in selling of beverages and bakery products; and rental of investment properties. Jakpaisan Estate Public Company Limited founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Pathum Thani, Thailand.
